## Checklist

- [ ] Focused on a single change; unrelated cleanup split out
- [ ] Tested the affected mode(s) end to end
- [ ] For UI changes: attached a before/after screenshot below
- [ ] Respected the gradio-6 gotchas (see [PORTING.md](../PORTING.md)) — `visible=False` mounting, `change` vs `input`, keeping tab-build gates queued, etc.
